name: School Services & Leasing
owner_or_parent: Durham School Services / National Express (Summit School Services platform, I Squared Capital)
principals: Ray Schmuck (local manager per source data)
districts_or_customers: Middleborough-area MA districts (legacy Durham/National Express yard)
recent_news: School Services & Leasing was acquired in 2000 as part of National Express's US school bus rollup; National Express's North American school bus business was acquired by I Squared Capital and rebranded as Summit School Services. Durham/National Express also paid $1.4M settlement for excessive idling in Holyoke and Worcester, MA.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. 'School Services & Leasing' is the legacy corporate name of a Durham/National Express school-bus operating/leasing entity acquired in 2000 and now part of the Summit platform itself. Middleboro address is almost certainly a Durham/Summit yard or registered leasing subsidiary. Exclude from outreach list.

name: D & M Bus Co
owner_or_parent: unknown (lead exec Ken Powell listed as President per source data; no parent identified)
recent_news: No web presence, no listings in Michigan State Police school-bus inspection PDFs or MDOT licensed-carrier portal results returned for 'D & M Bus' at 4330 2nd St, Ecorse, MI 48229. Note state-field/address mismatch in source data (state=VA, address=MI). Detroit / Ecorse market is dominated by Trinity Transportation, Durham, and DPSCD-internal fleet.
fit_notes: Highly uncertain. No corroborating web/regulatory footprint; entity could be dissolved, renamed, or a charter/livery operator misclassified as school bus. If a real operator exists in Ecorse with ~50 employees and a Powell-family principal, it would be a plausible small Detroit-metro tuck-in, but flag this as a manual call/state-registry check before any meaningful outreach.

name: Lakeland Area Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Likely Student Transportation of America (STA) — CDPQ-owned platform
districts_or_customers: Monmouth County, NJ school districts (likely Wall Twp / Manasquan / Brielle area)
recent_news: The listed HQ address (3349 State Route 138, Wall Township, NJ 07719) is the corporate headquarters of Student Transportation of America (STA), which controls 55+ passenger transportation subsidiaries operating under regional brand names. STA executed a series of acquisitions in 2024-25 expanding its NJ/US footprint by $70M+ in revenue. Lakeland Area Bus Svc Inc appears to be an STA-controlled NJ contractor entity registered at STA HQ — distinct from the (unrelated) Wisconsin operator at lakelandareabuses.com and from Lakeland Bus Lines (Dover, NJ commuter operator).
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Entity is registered at STA's Wall Township HQ and is almost certainly an STA-controlled subsidiary or operating affiliate (STA owns 55+ regional brands). STA is a direct strategic competitor to Summit, not an acquisition candidate. Exclude from outreach; flag the underlying district contract as potential competitive intel.
